newTests.name: iteration-loop-cancel-branch-test > iteration-loop cancel cond branch > returns :status :cancelled when atom is true at loop entry
cancelled-mid-query-test > query-env! with cancel fired before first iteration runs > cancels if the atom is set AFTER reset but BEFORE iteration-loop starts checking
cancel-reset-between-queries-test > :cancel-atom reset on new query-env! call > a cancel from a prior query is cleared before the next query runs
on-iteration-throwing-callback-swallowed-test > throwing :on-iteration callback > query-env! keeps running when callback throws
cancelled-before-query-test > query-env! with pre-cancelled atom > returns :status :cancelled and zero iterations
on-iteration-event-shape-test > iteration event map shape > event map has all documented keys
cancel-atom-init-test > create-env :cancel-atom > is present on a fresh env
on-iteration-error-path-test > query-env! :on-iteration on error > fires callback with :status :error when the LLM call throws
on-iteration-opt-plumbed-test > :on-iteration opt threading > query-env! accepts :on-iteration without error when no iterations run
cancel-query-flip-test > cancel-query! > is a no-op on an env without :cancel-atom (hand-rolled or stubbed)
